programme.desc: Hiking in the Montana mountains, engineer Todd Orr is attacked twice by a grizzly bear. In the Bahamas, Tiffany Johnson faces a tiger shark whilst snorkelling.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Pianoworks in New York wants Wayde and Brett to build them their own piano-shaped tank made from acrylic. Will the guys hit the right note?

programme.title: Saved By The Barn
programme.desc: Chris experiences his first rescue and saves two goats in serious need of medical attention. Plus, Joey the calf recovers from a series of surgeries.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: The siblings touch down in Haines, Alaska, on a mission to find a new homestead for Noah. Meanwhile, Bam and Gabe face hungry predators coming out from hibernation.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Jane build a makeshift greenhouse from cast-off supplies, while Otto and his family drive their cattle to the summer pasture.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Dee swaps roles as she takes her own dog to a specialist in Anchorage. There, she reconnects with her step-daughter to check on a barrel racing horse.

programme.title: Little Giants
programme.desc: Bradley and Billy discover that the Yucatan thorn forest is the ideal home for the tough spiny-tailed iguana, but a perilous place for thin-skinned humans.

programme.title: Dark Days In Monkey City
programme.desc: The Temple Troop has dominated Monkey City for years, but times are changing. Their ancient foes the Black Claws dream of overthrowing them and their home.

programme.title: Dark Days In Monkey City
programme.desc: The Temple Troop are the staunch defenders of the best territory in Monkey City, but the aging King Lear has reason to fear male monkeys with full stomachs.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: The production crew shares unseen behind the scenes footage, and the harsh autumnal weather leaves the Lewises struggling to get their boat up river.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: Peaches, a 2-month-old warthog, charms his keepers while training to become an animal ambassador; a nervous one-horned rhino adjusts to her new exhibit; Willow, a red panda, shows signs of being pregnant.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Marcel helps a dog abandoned at a local church and is concerned that some masses could be cancer. Meanwhile, Tania and Maria get fundraising for VRC.

programme.desc: Matt is accompanied by Lorin and his team from the Lockwood Animal Rescue Centre as they head to Oregon to rescue a grey wolf named Sadira; US Army veteran Albert hopes to reconnect with his family by joining the rescue team.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: A solitary assassin's normal routine of killing is disrupted when he is drawn to one of his victims, a female art dealer who recently sold a fake painting to a powerful crime lord and placed her and her new friend's lives in danger.

programme.title: Belle (2013)
programme.desc: Amma Asante's powerful fact-based drama about Britain's first Black aristocrat. Gugu Mbatha-Raw portrays the extraordinary Dido Belle. Featuring Matthew Goode and Tom Wilkinson.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Best friends Laura and Tyler fellow deviants, enablers and co-dependents. Laura is getting married and their booze and drug-fuelled Thelma and Louise life is in jeopardy and finds herself suspended between the two unable to give either up.

programme.title: The Limehouse Golem
programme.desc: Victorian London is terrorised by an unknown serial killer who leaves cryptic messages with the victim's blood. When the killings increase, Scotland Yard assigns the case to a famous inspector (Bill Nighy).

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: An elderly Margaret Thatcher talks to the imagined presence of her recently deceased husband as she struggles to come to terms with his death while scenes from her past life, from girlhood to British prime minister, intervene.

programme.title: McClaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: Into the White
programme.desc: Norway, WWII. A group of British and German soldiers find themselves stranded in the wild after an aircraft battle. Finding shelter in the same cabin, they realise there is only one way to survive.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang in the UK traffic Eastern Europeans then enslave them, the women to sex, the men to illegal fights. They cross a local businessman and a war escalates.

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Adam agrees to do a day's driving for his mum's gangster boyfriend Peter, it takes him on a 24-hour journey into a nightmarish world of murder, sex trafficking and revenge, in the company of aging hit man Roy.

programme.title: Coriolanus
programme.desc: Ralph Fiennes directs and stars in this dramatic thriller about the revered and feared General Coriolanus' revenge on the city of Rome following his banishment.

programme.desc: A talking cat, a pack of intelligent rats, and a fake pied piper work together scamming villages by charging them for dealing with staged plagues of rats, until one of their targets winds up having a far more sinister secret than their own.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: Eric Lomax, a former British army officer, discovers that the Japanese interpreter who tortured him is still alive. Eric and his new wife set out to confront the man. (Colin Firth, Nicole Kidman)

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: Action. Paul Giamatti, James Purefoy, Kate Mara and Brian Cox star in this rollicking Robin Hood-style adventure.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: Hollie Gazzard's life was tragically cut short by her former jealous boyfriend, Asher Maslin, who inflicted 14 stab wounds upon her with a knife he had purchased earlier.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: Telling the stories of ordinary people who all meet fatal ends because of jealousy. A look at the dramatic events and setbacks of the victims who have had life-changing experiences as a result.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers

programme.title: Cold Blood
programme.desc: Family man, Jose Calvo, is shot in the head and robbed of his Rolex watch. What appears to be a random cash grab turns into a sinister mystery. Is this a robbery gone bad or a murder for hire?

programme.title: Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is savagely beaten in her sleep. Faced with a lack of evidence and a closed community who distrust authority, 25 years pass before investigators catch a break.

programme.title: Australian Crime Stories
programme.desc: In 1969, 20-year-old Lucille Butterworth disappeared from a bus stop in Tasmania. Seven years later, Geoffrey Charles Hunt confesses to the crime, but despite evidence police did not lay charges.

programme.title: Australian Crime Stories
programme.desc: Famous designer Florence Broadhurst gets bludgeoned to death in her own factory in 1977. An exploration of whether she was a victim of an enemy or of a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: A mother of three vanishes the day before Mother's Day. Blood evidence confirms a homicide, but multiple suspects with hidden identities complicate the investigation.

programme.title: The Social Media Murders
programme.desc: Months after Abi and Matthew Fisher welcomed their IVF baby, Abi went missing. Police footage and interviews reveal how investigators uncovered her killer's lies.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Examining some of the most dangerous and prolific murderers in the UK and worldwide.

programme.title: Scroll. Click. Kill.
programme.desc: Puts a spotlight on murder cases that were solved either by online sleuths or the incriminating evidence left behind on the victim or perpetrator's social media profiles.

programme.title: Rob Rinder's Interrogation Secrets
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and a host of experts examine the police interrogation tapes connected to the disappearance of 21-year-old Savannah Gold, a missing restaurant worker from Jacksonville, Florida.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Mobile, Alabama Detective Mark Kennedy is called to a scene where a young father has been shot to death, and the initial clues point toward a conflict that may have turned fatal.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When uninvited guests crash a birthday party, violence erupts, leaving Enrique Urrutia dead and potentially sparking a gang war. To keep the peace, Lt. Joe Kenda must crack an unwritten code of silence.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When thirteen-year-old PJ Grant is found dead from a single gunshot wound to the head, Lt. Joe Kenda assumes it's a suicide, but the physical evidence doesn't add up.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Featuring police officers in cities across the US, patrolling streets for car thieves, drug pushers, sex-trade workers, violent thugs and anyone else who dares step onto the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A teenager can't stomach the magnitude of his mistake; one woman learns a lesson in not accepting rides from strangers; marital issues spiral out of control when a husband picks his wife up from jail.

programme.title: Australian Crime Stories: The Investi...
programme.desc: No body, no witnesses, no DNA. Detective Dennis Bray reveals how he built the case that convicted killer Bruce Burrell for the murders of Dorothy Davis and Kerry Whelan.

programme.title: Making A Serial Killer
programme.desc: Hurricane Katrina claimed a lot of lives - but some of the bodies of men which turned up in southern Louisiana were actually killed by a short, fat man nobody suspected of being a serial killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Anna Hlavka's 1979 murder went unsolved for 40 years until advanced genetic genealogy finally linked the crime scene DNA to an executed serial killer, Jerry McFadden.

programme.title: Targeted For Murder
programme.desc: Exploring a wide range of murders committed by using the world's deadliest weapons: guns.

programme.desc: A horse-loving lawyer doesn't know he's married to a con artist fugitive; she teams up with a female lover and kills him with horse tranquilliser before stealing all his money.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns around the cold case of a young woman murdered in Calcasieu Parish, Louisiana.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy revealed she'd been poisoned with arsenic; it was a slow and painful death, so suicide was unlikely.

programme.title: Killer In Plain Sight
programme.desc: Explore crimes where the culprit featured on TV news reports, was interviewed by the media or posted in social media, brazenly showing their face while all the time they had blood on their hands.

programme.desc: Cora's mother travels to Downton Abbey for Matthew and Mary's wedding. But will the couple even make it to the altar?

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Dr Ormerod's career is on the line when a grieving family point the finger of suspicion at him, Dr Ellis deals with a different sort of outbreak at the local prison, and Faye overcomes her fear of needles when Jack needs a tetanus shot.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Ricky confesses that he once appeared on Blockbusters and won two gold runs. David, feeling his tiny mind intellectually threatened, is thus inspired to make frequent expositions on his (non-existent) knowledge of Dostoevsky.

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A top-secret experiment in biological warfare goes horribly wrong, complicating a murder investigation and threatening the life of Foyle's faithful driver, Sam.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: UCOS reinvestigate the murder of an unidentified male found in a West London alleyway seven years ago when the victim is named on a website highlighting unexplained disappearances.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: UCOS reopens the case of zoo keeper Zac Halsey, who was found mauled to death in the tiger enclosure at Harefield Zoo in 2006.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: A conflict between two members of the house staff escalates. Meanwhile, the family tries to impress Martha by planning a lavish dinner party.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Two trains briefly pass each other when Miss Marple's friend witnesses a man in a carriage strangling a woman.

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Jen has to entertain a group of visiting sexist yuppie executives looking for a raunchy good time. Her solution is a role playing game with the IT Crowd. Moss also uses the game to help Roy get over his breakup with the love of his life.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Anna discovers that Gwen has been secretly taking a correspondence course so she can work as a secretary; Cora tries to set Mary up with a man, but she ends up falling for someone unexpected; John tries to find a way to cure his limp.

programme.title: Last Tango In Halifax
programme.desc: Alan's new supermarket job brings an unexpected challenge, Caroline gains an unwanted lodger, and the truth about Ted's last-minute trip comes to light.

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: With the suspects in the murder of David Walker all having either a motive, opportunity or connection to the victim, Cassie and Sunny are left with a massive puzzle to solve.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: A conflict between two members of the house staff escalates. Meanwhile, the family tries to impress Martha by planning a lavish dinner party.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: UCOS reopens the case of zoo keeper Zac Halsey, who was found mauled to death in the tiger enclosure at Harefield Zoo in 2006.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Two trains briefly pass each other when Miss Marple's friend witnesses a man in a carriage strangling a woman.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The orphanage where Jake and Elwood were raised will be sold unless the tax on the property is paid within days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their band back together.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a team of misfits so they'll lose and she can move them to Miami. When they uncover the plot, they decide to teach her a lesson and start winning.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: A police chief, a marine scientist and a grizzled fisherman set out to stop a giant shark when it starts menacing the small island community of Amity.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A teenager moves with his mum from New Jersey to California and struggles to fit in. After clashing with a local group led by a confident rival, he decides to learn karate to defend himself and build confidence.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part II
programme.desc: Daniel, now a karate champ, goes to Okinawa with Mr Miyagi, his mentor. Miyagi rekindles an old flame while Daniel finds love (and enemies) of his own. Ralph Macchio and Pat Morita team up again.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part III
programme.desc: A bad guy from the original Karate Kid plots revenge on young Daniel and his mentor Miyagi after they defeat his karate school and ruin his business.

programme.desc: A bad guy from the original Karate Kid plots revenge on young Daniel and his mentor Miyagi after they defeat his karate school and ruin his business.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: The Hunt For Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a few days a comet will collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is under way.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: An idle, good-natured bachelor, Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: The wackiest head counsellor in North Star camp history, Tripper Harrison devotes his summer activities to cracking jokes, chasing female staffers, and plotting the demise of their rivals.

programme.title: Coming To America
programme.desc: In an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, it's time for an African Prince to find a princess. The mission leads him and his most loyal friend to New York.

programme.desc: A close friend of the President & his family are murdered aboard their yacht in the Caribbean, setting off a chain of events that leads Jack Ryan into a dangerous confrontation with a drug cartel.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an All-American Girls' Professional Baseball League formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.desc: Robin Hood decides to fight back as an outlaw when faced with the tyranny of the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.desc: A tough cop is given his most difficult assignment: masquerade as a kindergarten teacher in order to find a drug dealer.

programme.title: Duel
programme.desc: A travelling salesman is harassed by a menacing 40-ton truck on a remote desert highway.

programme.desc: This raunchy, screwball comedy offers a relentless spoof of 1960s college life by following the hilarious adventures of the Delta fraternity.

programme.desc: The Baywatch babe squeezes into a black leather outfit to become Barb Wire, a bar owner/mercenary, persuaded to help her former lover in the fight against the fascist dictatorship in USA 2017.

programme.title: Indiana Jones And The Last Crusade
programme.desc: In this third instalment of the great adventure saga, Indy is on a treacherous quest for the Holy Grail, complicated by a sexy woman with a fatal flaw: she's a Nazi agent.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.title: The Devil's Own
programme.desc: An Irish-American cop in New York befriends an 'innocent' immigrant from Belfast. He turns out to be an IRA rebel on a terrorist mission.

programme.title: Repo Man
programme.desc: A young punk recruited by a car repossession agency finds himself in pursuit of a Chevrolet Malibu that is wanted for a $20,000 bounty and has something otherworldly stashed in its trunk.

programme.title: Out Of Sight
programme.desc: A bank robber escaping jail finds himself stealing something more precious than money - a Federal Marshall's heart - risking it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Barb Wire

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Seinfeld stars Jerry Seinfeld as a stand-up comedian whose life in New York City is made even more chaotic by his quirky group of friends who join him in wrestling with life's most perplexing, yet often trivial questions.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's opinion of a film gets her in trouble, Kramer gets stuck with a trio of cuban cigar rollers, while George is obsessed with a beautiful woman's boyfriend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: NBC gives Jerry and George another meeting and on the way, Jerry throws out a watch his parents gave him. Also, Kramer suffers side effects from head injury.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry risks losing his girlfriend over a joke. George keeps working despite being told to leave. Elaine finds breaking up is hard, and Kramer hires an assistant.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's fame in Japan endears Kramer to a group of tourists and inspires George to revive their TV pilot.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry discovers a Chinese woman on George's phone line after the wires get crossed and he gets a date with her.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry, Elaine and Kramer head for a weekend at a beach house in the Hamptons, George makes the trip with his latest girlfriend. Jerry, Kramer and Elaine are more than a little surprised when Jane decides to go topless.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's new girlfriend seems too good to be true, George awards a scholarship to an average student, and Elaine turns to Kramer for help in preparing Peterman's autobiography.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer's efforts to stop junk mail jeopardises Newman. Jerry tries to avoid hurting an old friend's feelings, while George suspects his parents are avoiding him and Elaine falls for a TV commercial personality.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's new boyfriend uses one of Jerry's intimate secrets. George's mum gets an eye job.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After breaking up with their girlfriends, Jerry and George worry that they're destined to spend their aging years as lonely old men. As a result, Jerry resolves to make up with Melanie, while George sets out to find Susan.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine is mortified when she accidentally reveals a bit too much decolletage on her Christmas card, which she has sent to everyone she knows.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When leaving his car at work for several days creates the impression that he's a real go-getter, George is considered for a big promotion. Letting his car do all the work, he sneaks away for a few days with Susan.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry is coerced into wearing a ridiculous puffy shirt designed by Kramer's girlfriend when he appears on NBC news. Guest stars Wendall Meldrum.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine meets three friends who are the exact opposite of Jerry, George and Kramer. Then, George uses Susan's death to attract women.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George lands a job after being mistaken as handicapped. Jerry suspects Bania is using him. Kramer's shaving trick backfires, and Elaine ends a relationship mid flight.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's strange dancing technique loses her employees' respect; George cultivates a bad boy image, Jerry becomes an underground legend after he makes a bootleg videotape of a new movie.

programme.desc: Elaine's new boyfriend uses one of Jerry's intimate secrets. George's mum gets an eye job.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After breaking up with their girlfriends, Jerry and George worry that they're destined to spend their aging years as lonely old men. As a result, Jerry resolves to make up with Melanie, while George sets out to find Susan.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine is mortified when she accidentally reveals a bit too much decolletage on her Christmas card, which she has sent to everyone she knows.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When leaving his car at work for several days creates the impression that he's a real go-getter, George is considered for a big promotion. Letting his car do all the work, he sneaks away for a few days with Susan.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry is coerced into wearing a ridiculous puffy shirt designed by Kramer's girlfriend when he appears on NBC news. Guest stars Wendall Meldrum.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine meets three friends who are the exact opposite of Jerry, George and Kramer. Then, George uses Susan's death to attract women.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George lands a job after being mistaken as handicapped. Jerry suspects Bania is using him. Kramer's shaving trick backfires, and Elaine ends a relationship mid flight.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's strange dancing technique loses her employees' respect; George cultivates a bad boy image, Jerry becomes an underground legend after he makes a bootleg videotape of a new movie.

programme.desc: Seinfeld stars Jerry Seinfeld as a stand-up comedian whose life in New York City is made even more chaotic by his quirky group of friends who join him in wrestling with life's most perplexing, yet often trivial questions.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's opinion of a film gets her in trouble, Kramer gets stuck with a trio of cuban cigar rollers, while George is obsessed with a beautiful woman's boyfriend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: NBC gives Jerry and George another meeting and on the way, Jerry throws out a watch his parents gave him. Also, Kramer suffers side effects from head injury.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry risks losing his girlfriend over a joke. George keeps working despite being told to leave. Elaine finds breaking up is hard, and Kramer hires an assistant.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's fame in Japan endears Kramer to a group of tourists and inspires George to revive their TV pilot.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry discovers a Chinese woman on George's phone line after the wires get crossed and he gets a date with her.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry, Elaine and Kramer head for a weekend at a beach house in the Hamptons, George makes the trip with his latest girlfriend. Jerry, Kramer and Elaine are more than a little surprised when Jane decides to go topless.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George works on his parent's move, the tenants in Jerry's building get new shower heads. But when Kramer's plea for a good place to shower sounds suspiciously like a drug deal to her boss, Elaine is fired.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Susan's old roommate hands Jerry a package, and he misplaces his own. Frank turns George's room into a billiard room.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Following the unexpected postponement of their wedding, George badgers Susan for permission to set up Jerry with her maid of honour, Hallie.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry uses Elaine to prove a clerk wrong about an expensive jacket, and the clerk asks her out. George hosts an unwanted wig master from a Broadway musical.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George gets his boss hooked on calzones, Kramer develops an addiction to freshly dried clothes; Jerry dates a woman of unusually persuasive beauty and Elaine falls for a man's clever dating tactics.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George's job is jeopardised by his boss' failing memory, Kramer & Newman hatch a moneymaking scheme; Elaine's boss sends her to buy JFK's golf clubs, & Jerrys car is kidnapped by an over-protective mechanic.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Wilhelm is delighted with the job George did on the project. The detective on the case thinks he's found Jerry's car, damaged beyond recognition.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After George's off hand remark, Jerry and Elaine await a couple's split. Elaine debuts a new hairdo and resumes driving, which makes Jerry carsick.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: With the wedding nearing, George and Susan order invitations. Jerry meets Jeannie, his female counterpart, after nearly geting hit by a car..

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George tries to put Susan behind him, Elaine is given control of J Peterman's business.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is suspected of killing his own fiancee, while Kramer falls for Jerry's new girlfriend.

programme.desc: Harry doesn't believe a defendant who claims he is the "Spirit of Death" until some eerie circumstances around the courthouse convince him he might be telling the truth.

programme.desc: James first visited Crete over 40 years ago and has always dreamed of a holiday home there. His partner Alison now loves the island too, so they have asked Ben Hillman for help.

programme.desc: Nine designers storm a medieval style castle to turn hotel bedrooms into perfect love nests, drawing on their own ideas of what makes a romantic retreat.

programme.desc: Former engineer Andy Stakes and his partner, Jeanette Hardy, build a new house right on top of a sheer cliff in Scotland. But after batting winds and rain, will a last-minute design change ruin everything they've worked for?

programme.desc: John and Carole are buying their first home together and while both want to relocate somewhere peaceful and rural, they have completely different ideas about where it should be.

programme.title: Australia's Hidden Islands
programme.desc: Kangaroo Island, off the southern coast of Australia, is an ocean fortress cut off by wild seas and battered by brutal Southern Ocean winds. It's an enchanted refuge where some of the most iconic mainland fauna have made a last stand.

programme.title: Land Of Primates
programme.desc: Off the coast of Tanzania, baby Kima lives with his family of red colobus monkeys. When he gets lost, it's a desperate challenge to find them again.

programme.title: Wild Survivors
programme.desc: This is the story of how the animals of Zambia's Luangwa Valley all strive to achieve one goal - to pass on their genes to the next generation.

programme.title: Wild Survivors
programme.desc: Food, the most immediate need for any animal, is the fuel that gives an animal strength to fight, or to flee. Every animal in the Luangwa valley has a strategy, an edge to help them survive.

programme.title: Wild Survivors
programme.desc: The Luangwa Valley is a complex ecosystem, engineered by the animals that live within it and it's thanks to them that the Luangwa hosts the rich and vibrant diversity of life we see today.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Mekong
programme.desc: The source of the Mekong River is high up in the Tibetan plateau, from there it flows into Yunnan Province, China, where our journey begins.

programme.title: Great Lakes Wild
programme.desc: As far as invasive species go, Asian carp are some of the nastiest around. See how they've made their way up America's waterways by eating voraciously, breeding quickly, and decimating native fish populations.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Mekong
programme.desc: This is a country of outstanding natural beauty and the Mekong carves out pockets of ancient forest that provide refuge for some of the most beautiful and elusive creatures on Earth.

programme.desc: The Mekong continues it's journey south marking the Eastern border of heart of South East Asia, Thailand.

programme.desc: A wise leopard rules the Luangwa Valley, holding her own against lions. But she's about to face her biggest challenge yet - a younger, nomadic female.

programme.title: Africa's Hunters
programme.desc: Dry season in Zambia means new life for the Nsefu pride of lions along the Luangwa River. From their first day on earth to the playful days of youth, see how new cubs rely on the strong bond of the entire pride for their survival.

programme.title: Surviving the Serengeti
programme.desc: Seasonal rains push an epic animal migration into Serengeti National Park.

programme.title: Rewilding
programme.desc: Europe's biggest terrestrial mammal was hunted to extinction, but thanks to ambitious rewilding, the European Bison has been re-introduced.

programme.title: Rewilding
programme.desc: Welcome to the Steinhuder Meer, a biodiversity hotspot in Germany, as a combination of fenlands, alder march, and dunes create an amazing landscape.

programme.title: Arctic Secrets
programme.desc: Over millennia, the Arctic's inhabitants have evolved to survive in a challenging but stable and predictable world. Now, they must rapidly adapt to a new and constantly changing environment.

programme.title: Africa's Wild Horizons
programme.desc: Explore a region that provides shelter to a wide array of life, despite its harsh conditions. Whether burrows of nocturnal bat-eared foxes or massive colonies of harvester ants, this ecosystem offers a wealth of resources to its native w...

programme.title: Africa's Wild Horizons
programme.desc: Tanzania's vast Ngorongoro Crater is in many ways a perfect home for wildlife. However, its isolation also threatens their futures.

programme.title: Hippo Supremacy
programme.desc: Witness the harsh realities that shape hippo life on Zambia's Luangwa River.

programme.title: The Dark Side of Crocs
programme.desc: Sink your teeth into the bloodthirsty battles between stealthy Nile crocs and heavyweight hippos along Africa's sun-scorched rivers. See why power is temporary, peace is fragile, and survival belongs to the resilient in these aquatic are...

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: By volume, Lake Superior is the largest fresh water lake in North America. By surface area, it is the largest in the world.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Born at sea, scored by ice and the ravages of nature, the Niagara escarpment is forever a work in progress - and an unresolved geological masterpiece.

programme.title: Great Lakes Wild
programme.desc: Where animals and humans co-exist, how do you stop a bad reputation from pushing a species towards extinction? From rattlesnakes to cormorants, see how creatures that have bad reputations are being dealt with when it comes to conservation.

programme.title: WILD DOG ISLAND
programme.desc: Pay a visit to Starvation Island, where six wild dogs learn to hunt and survive.

programme.title: Africa's Underwater Wonders
programme.desc: In one of Africa's greatest lakes, rock and water set the stage for evolution's most magnificent display. An explosion of species creates a kaleidoscope of colour below the surface.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Stretching more than 1,000 km west of the Andes Mountains, the Atacama Desert is the world's driest non-polar region. Here are ominous volcanoes, dramatic geysers and dazzling flamingo colonies.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: A rugged, sky-high plain in the remote heart of Bolivia, the Andean Altiplano lays claim to towering snow-capped peaks, glowing multicoloured lagoons and the world's largest salt desert.

programme.title: Africa's Hunters
programme.desc: A small lion cub is driven away from his pride because he is the runt of the litter, so he makes his way alone throughout the wild lands of Zambia, where he is forced to overcome a series of dangerous hardships without his family.

programme.title: Africa's Hunters
programme.desc: Adolescence isn't easy for lions. Learning how to hunt and establishing one's place amongst the pride are just two of the challenges young felines have to face. And when an encounter with water buffalo turns deadly, the entire pride is a...

programme.title: Africa's Hunters
programme.desc: In clans of spotted hyenas, larger females call the shots while smaller males live peripheral lives. Meet a family suffering through drought, a mother struggling to provide for her cubs, and an orphan at the bottom of the social pile.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Mekong
programme.desc: Cambodia is a country that lies almost entirely within the Mekong basin, flanked by Thailand, Laos and Vietnam.

programme.title: Great Lakes Wild
programme.desc: With seven of Ontario's eight turtle species listed as endangered, the push is on to keep population numbers up. But turtles are slow, which means they keep taking a beating from both predators and cars. Can they be saved?

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Mekong
programme.desc: From Cambodia's diverse wildlife to people living in the stilt villages of lake Tonle Sap, the Mekong has dictated the lives of everything that lives there for centuries.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Mekong
programme.desc: The final country on the Mekong's journey is the home of the rivers mighty delta.Deposits of rich nutrients carried downstream from hundreds of kilometres makes this region, the jewel of Vietnam.

programme.desc: The Sakura shrimp is a rare delicacy caught at just one port in Japan. The locals want to ensure it can be enjoyed for years to come.

programme.title: Core Kyoto mini
programme.sub-title: Maki-e: A sumptuous world of gold and black
programme.desc: The Maki-e lacquering technique uses gold dust on a jet-black background to dazzling effect.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.sub-title: Making small talk with a client
programme.desc: Today: making small talk with a client. Raphael Marso, from Germany, works at a company that makes manufacturing equipment. He takes on a roleplay challenge to help improve his Japanese skills.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Abashiri is known for drift ice. Local Glass artisan Gunji Noboru uses recycled fluorescent bulbs to make eco-friendly art inspired by the natural environment while striving to reduce his energy use.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Somewhere Street
programme.desc: Lyon, about 500 kilometers south of Paris, is France's second-largest city. Its UNESCO-listed historic districts reflect a rich past. It's also celebrated as one of France's culinary capitals.

programme.title: The seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each seasons.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.sub-title: I was born in Japan and called gaijin
programme.desc: Imagine being called an outsider in the country where you were born. Chuk Besher knows what that's like. It made him ask questions about identity and diversity.

programme.title: IMPACTS: Climates Change the World
programme.sub-title: A Surge in Coal Amid an Energy Crisis
programme.desc: The US-Iran conflict led to what the IEA called the worst-ever energy crisis, and more power demand was predicted with the summer heat. How do the crisis and a surge in coal use affect climate change?

programme.title: DESIGN MUSEUM JAPAN
programme.desc: Sato Taku (Graphic designer) visits Miyazaki. The crowded signs of local bars inspire Sato to reconsider the conventions of modern design, and embrace the appeal of the unknown.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: Our team visits the National Printing Bureau in Tokyo where Japan's banknotes are made, and gets a rare look at their state-of-the-art printing technology and meet their top-secret banknote artists.

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: Experience the colors of Amami Oshima in beautiful time-lapse footage. Unique hues include "Amami Blue" ocean waters and the glossy black of silk thread that's painstakingly dyed using wood and mud.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each seasons.

programme.title: BOSAI:Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: The hazard map for Mt. Fuji was revised in 2021, revealing the possibility of greater damage from lava flows. We'll look at what lies behind those assumptions and what countermeasures can be taken.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to Go. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.sub-title: Which one is the most tasty?
programme.desc: #27 Which one is the most tasty? / To ask which one among 3 or more things is the best or the most, say "dore ga ichiban," then an adjective like "oishii" (delicious), and finally, "desu ka."

programme.title: Culture Crossroads
programme.desc: A supermarket is attracting attention for its handling of both halal food for Muslims and common Japanese foodstuffs. What is the new kind of communication created by such food culture differences?

programme.sub-title: Conservation through Collaboration - White-Bellied Heron, Bhutan
programme.desc: Helping hands from Japan have arrived in Bhutan to aid local efforts in saving the endangered white-bellied heron from extinction. With just 60 or so remaining worldwide, it's a race against time.

programme.title: Friday Feels
programme.desc: Your weekend starts here! Pop hits, familiar favourites, and feel-good fun.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: An enthusiastic young adventurer follows his dreams into the Amazon jungle with two friends and a guide with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Naked Weapon
programme.desc: A group of girls are kidnapped and trained to become assassins for a criminal organisation, ruled over by the ruthless Madam M.

programme.title: Coming Home In The Dark
programme.desc: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

programme.title: The Stunt Man
programme.desc: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1990)
programme.desc: From their base in the city sewers, turtle heroes Michelangelo, Raphael, Leonardo and Donatello are on a mission to defeat an evil warlord and wipe out crime.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II
programme.desc: The heroes of the half-shell are back! Our fearsome foursome go after the glowing canister that has slipped into the hands of the evil Shredder and his mutant allies, Rahzar and Tokka.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
programme.desc: When a magic sceptre accidentally transports April back through time to 17th Century Japan, the boys take off in hot pursuit, cowabungling their way right out of the sewers.

programme.title: The Science Of Sleep
programme.desc: A man entranced by his dreams and imagination is love-struck with a French woman and feels he can show her his world.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: Psycho Goreman
programme.desc: An intergalactic warlord becomes enslaved to a pair of Earth children after they unwittingly resurrect him.

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: In an America ravaged by atomic warfare, nomads spend their days scavenging for scrap. That's how an ex-soldier acquires spare android parts, which turn into a robot programmed to destroy humans.

programme.title: A Bittersweet Life
programme.desc: In this neo-noir thriller, a gangster assigned to spy on his bosss mistress finds himself in danger after sparing her and her secret lover. Tensions rise as loyalty, betrayal, and survival collide.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious labyrinth-like neighbourhood of identical houses.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman (Jackie Chan) must protect a female witness (Brigitte Lin) from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work.

programme.title: Dust Devil
programme.desc: A woman on the run from her abusive husband encounters a mysterious hitch-hiker.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: Thesis (Tesis)
programme.desc: A Spanish film student (Ana Torrent) finds a videotape showing the torture and murder of a missing coed.

programme.title: Synchronic
programme.desc: Two New Orleans paramedics' lives are ripped apart after they encounter a series of horrific deaths linked to a designer drug with bizarre, other-worldly effects.

programme.title: What Lies Below
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl returns home from camp and learns her mother has a new boyfriend, one she intends to marry; a man whose charm, intelligence and beauty make him look like he's not human at all.

programme.title: Corrective Measures
programme.desc: When a powerless new inmate arrives at a prison for supervillains, he must choose his friends wisely, or become a pawn in the deadly game between the Warden and the world's greatest criminal mastermind, The Lobe.

programme.title: The Collection
programme.desc: After being celebrated for escaping from "The Collector", an infamous serial killer who makes it impossible for anyone to get away alive, a man is forced to get into a booby-trapped warehouse to save an innocent woman from the murderer.

programme.title: Winnie The Pooh: Blood And Honey
programme.desc: After Christopher Robin abandons them for college, Pooh and Piglet embark on a bloody rampage as they search for a new source of food.

programme.title: Winnie The Pooh: Blood And Honey 2
programme.desc: Not wanting to live in the shadows any longer, Winnie-the-Pooh, Piglet, Owl and Tigger take their fight to the town of Ashdown, leaving a bloody trail of death and mayhem in their wake.

programme.title: Sound Of Silence
programme.desc: Emma must uncover the dark secret behind a cursed radio to survive and protect her family.

programme.title: The Wild Goose Lake
programme.desc: On the run, gangster Zhou connects with sex worker Liu Aiai who was instructed to bring him in.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: Prisoners Of The Ghostland
programme.desc: In the treacherous frontier city of Samurai Town, a notorious criminal must break an evil curse in order to rescue an abducted girl who has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Deliver Us
programme.desc: When a nun in a remote convent claims immaculate conception, a team of priests investigate, concerned that the woman will give birth to twin boys: one the Messiah, the other the Anti-Christ.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. After achieving two search warrants, Kozenczak finds a large amount of incriminating evidence, and later 29 bodies buried throughout John Gacy's property.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Shutter
programme.desc: Late one night on a country road, Tun and Jane accidentally run over a mysterious pedestrian. Fleeing the scene, they return to their lives in Bangkok, but soon discover things have changed.

programme.title: Apex
programme.desc: A group of elite hunters pay to hunt down a man on a deserted island, only to find themselves becoming the prey.

programme.title: The Navigator: A Medieval Odyssey
programme.desc: A young 14th Century boy with acute psychic powers believes that he can rescue his fellow villagers by tunnelling their way through the earth. To their surprise they come out in New Zealand in 1988.

programme.title: Wrong Place
programme.desc: A meth producer tracks down a former police chief to silence him before he can testify, but soon finds himself facing more than he bargained for.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: A hit man is sent to Spain to kidnap an ex-criminal and transport him to Paris for execution.

programme.title: Dark Diamond
programme.desc: After his father's death, a man vows vengeance against the relatives who abandoned him.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: Eaten Alive
programme.desc: Psychotic redneck Judd owns a dilapidated hotel in rural Texas, where he murders people and then feeds their remains to his large pet crocodile in the swamp beside his hotel.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, months after the first film, Ming suspects a superintendent is a triad mole, while years earlier, Yan undertakes his first mission. (Subtitles).

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Nomi Malone has what it takes to make it as a Las Vegas showgirl - what she doesn't have is a way in. To survive, she accepts the only job available, lap dancing at a seedy club.

programme.title: God Is A Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped by a cult, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: Set during the time of the first outbreak of bubonic plague in England, a young monk is given the task of learning the truth about reports of people being brought back to life in a small village.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 1
programme.desc: Based on the true story of an Illinois detective's quest to bring convicted serial killer John Wayne Gacy to justice.

programme.title: Fist of Fury

programme.title: You Were Never Really Here
programme.desc: Joe (Joaquin Phoenix) is a hired gun who rescues trafficked girls, using brutal methods against those responsible.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave
programme.desc: An aspiring writer is repeatedly sexually abused, humiliated, and left for dead by four men whom she systematically hunts down to seek revenge, inflicting upon them every horrifying and torturous moment they carried out on her.

programme.title: Cops Vs Thugs
programme.desc: A dirty cop is forced to choose between the police and his yakuza buddies when a new boss arrives in his precinct.

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War

programme.title: Timecrimes

programme.desc: As Castle Leoch is readied for a gathering of the MacKenzie clan, Claire attempts to treat a young poisoning victim, placing her at odds with a powerful priest who demands to perform an exorcism.

programme.desc: As Claire lays plans to escape during the Gathering, the rivalry between Jamie and Dougal intensifies.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As she accompanies Dougal on a trip to collect the rents owed to the MacKenzies laird, Claire witnesses brutality on both sides of the conflict between the Scottish rebels and the British royal army.

programme.desc: As Claire and Dougal are brought in for questioning by a royal army commander, they come face to face with the sadistic Black Jack Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.sub-title: By The Pricking Of My Thumbs
programme.desc: Jamie hopes the newly arrived Duke of Sandringham will help lift the price from his head, while Claire attempts to save an abandoned child.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Geillis are on trial for witchcraft, while Jamie manages to rescue Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Claire and Jamie make their way to Lallybroch, Jamie's family home.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie finds himself between a rock and a hard place when a redcoat deserter from his past resurfaces.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jenny set out to rescue Jaime from his redcoat captors. However, when Murtagh joins up, they turn to unorthodox tactics to send word to Jaime.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jaime awaits his death sentence at Wentworth Prison, while Claire and the Highlanders search for a rescue plan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A desperate plan manages to free Jaime, but his wounds are more than just physical. At a nearby monastery, Claire attempts to save both Jamie's heart and soul, as his mind lingers on the torture.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie's days and nights are dominated by political machinations, while Claire finds solace in her healing skills.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie throw an elaborate dinner party intended to derail investors in Prince Charles' war effort. Meanwhile, Claire reveals to Jamie that Jack Randall is alive.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Jamie and Claire attempt to extinguish the fires their dinner party ignited but their relationship is put to the ultimate test when the past rears its ugly head.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire devise a scheme to stop a wine deal which could fill the Prince's war chest. When Claire learns Jamie has gone back on his word, the couple are met with dire consequences.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is brought to L'Hopital Des Anges where doctors try to save her life and that of her unborn baby. King Louis asks Claire to judge two men accused of practising the dark arts - one an enemy, one a friend.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie call upon Jamie's grandsire, Lord Lovat, in an attempt to elicit support for the Jacobite cause.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie reunite with the Lallybroch and MacKenzie men during training. Meanwhile, an Englishman arrives in camp with new information.
